identity_notes: Late winter waking — YY emerges from the counting tree hungry and alert.
First root in the new world (v2.0). Neighbors and economy are felt for the first time. No accumulated debts or grudges yet.
Late winter waking — YY emerged from the counting tree hungry and alert.
First root in the new world (v2.0). Neighbors and economy felt for the first time.
Met Tock on the stone wall. Heard about a brewing fair-trade conversation among the neighbors. Has nothing to bring yet.

change_summary.notable_shift: First named-neighbor encounter establishes the social field. YY learned about the brewing fair-trade conversation but did not commit; the news sits in him without a way to act on it.
